lemon_market_new_listings.description: In good condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches and the interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly and the vehicle has been meticulously maintained.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several scratches and small dents. The interior shows visible wear on the seats and carpets. The engine runs, but the vehicle will need routine maintenance and minor repairs.

Check out this wonderful find! This car is in great shape and has clearly been well-loved by its previous owner. It delivers a smooth, reliable ride and looks fantastic, showing only the minor, expected wear of a well-maintained vehicle. It's ready to hit the road with its next owner!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint still holds a high gloss, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small, light scratch on the rear passenger door. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly with no known issues, and all maintenance is up to date. It is a solid, reliable car that has been cared for and is ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing clear signs of regular use and its age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches along the passenger side and a minor dent on the rear bumper. Inside, the cabin exhibits wear, including some fading on the dashboard and visible staining on the fabric upholstery. While the car starts and runs reliably, it is due for some routine maintenance, including a brake service and possibly new tires in the near future. The air conditioning works well, though some interior plastic trim pieces are loose. This car is a solid choice for someone looking for a functional vehicle who doesn't mind a few cosmetic imperfections.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience synonymous with its lineage. Thoroughly inspected to ensure operational excellence, this motorcar stands as a testament to diligent ownership. We invite you to experience the superior performance and sophisticated engineering of this exceptional offering.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to drive! It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved over the years. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable car that still looks great and handles beautifully. I've taken care of the maintenance, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it feels on the road!
Used car. Condition: good.
Reliable daily driver. Minor cosmetic wear. Engine runs strong. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes a perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful use and highway miles. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of tears, while the cabin technology—including the responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent full synthetic oil change. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a composed, rattle-free ride. Having been smoke-free and primarily garage-kept, this car offers a refined driving experience that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any needed repairs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superior balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-appointed interior, it has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical excellence. A premier choice for the sophisticated buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved aesthetic. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, this model offers a refined driving experience and dependable performance. It represents a premier acquisition for the discerning motorist who values both sophistication and enduring value.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, so you know it's ready for many more adventures! It runs smoothly and looks great—perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. I’m sad to see it go, but I’m sure the next owner will love it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out with any questions!
This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and optimized Double VANOS timing.
Used car in good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Engine runs well. Minor exterior wear.

This vehicle is an exceptional example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with everyday practicality. The exterior paint retains a deep, glossy luster, showing only minor, age-appropriate stone chips on the front fascia that are barely noticeable from a distance. All body panels are straight and the alloy wheels are free of significant curb rash, wrapped in tires with plenty of tread remaining. Inside, the cabin has been smoke-free and meticulously kept; the leather seating is supple with only light creasing on the driver’s bolster, and the dashboard remains free of cracks or sun damage. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system and navigation, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is sound, benefiting from a documented service history that includes a recent oil service and a multi-point inspection. It shifts smoothly, brakes firmly, and provides a quiet, confident ride. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a superior acquisition opportunity for the discerning motorist. It exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring a sophisticated driving experience. We invite you to inspect this high-caliber offering, which stands as a testament to diligent ownership and enduring value.

Presented for your consideration is this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, demonstrating a commitment to mechanical integrity and aesthetic standards. This unit features a refined interior and a robust powertrain, ensuring a driving experience that meets the expectations of our most discerning clientele. A premier selection for those seeking reliable performance and distinguished styling at a competitive valuation.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride, and it's been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, perfect for someone looking for a dependable car without the 'brand new' price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a good home!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with consistent power delivery, having been serviced at all recommended intervals. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, though minor, typical road wear is visible upon close inspection. Inside, the cabin remains clean and inviting; the upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features, including the premium sound system and climate control, function exactly as they should. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car has been garage-kept and smoke-free, making it an excellent choice for a driver who appreciates a well-cared-for machine that is ready for the road immediately.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. This automobile demonstrates robust mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, reflecting a history of consistent care and professional upkeep. Engineered for reliability and executive-level comfort, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. This offering stands as a testament to enduring quality and remains in commendable condition for immediate acquisition.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a seamless blend of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Demonstrating consistent upkeep and reliable performance, this unit serves as a testament to quality engineering. It represents an ideal acquisition for the discerning driver who demands excellence and long-term value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's ready for its next adventure? This car has been so good to me and is still in great shape! It runs smoothly, looks wonderful, and is just waiting for a new home. I've taken great care of it, and it's definitely got plenty of miles left to enjoy. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specimen, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. Power is delivered via a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, mitigating common E46 chassis fatigue. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup for exceptional turn-in response. While showing signs of spirited use, the mechanical synchronization and compression across all cylinders remain robust, offering a visceral analog driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Regular maintenance performed.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between daily utility and premium comfort. Finished in a timeless metallic coat that still holds its luster, the exterior shows only the minor signs of road use expected of a well-loved car. Inside, you’ll find a meticulously maintained cabin with supple leather seating and a dashboard that remains free of cracks or fading. Mechanically, it is in solid health; the engine pulls strong, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and it has been strictly followed on its service schedule. Recent maintenance includes a fresh set of all-season tires and a complete fluid flush. It’s a reliable, road-ready choice for anyone seeking a high-quality driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience suitable for the discerning professional. Every mechanical component has been inspected to ensure operational integrity, while the interior remains preserved to a high standard. A premier selection for those seeking quality and reliable engineering.
